fields.label: Display name
fields.validation: Not explicitly constrained in UI beyond backend checks.
fields.impact: Shown in UI ownership labels and user audit context.

fields.label: E-mail
fields.validation: Must be valid e-mail format.
fields.impact: Used for notifications and owner reporting dimensions.

fields.label: Locale
fields.validation: Not explicitly constrained in UI beyond backend checks.
fields.impact: Changes localization of formatted dates/numbers in reports.

fields.label: Current password
fields.validation: Not explicitly constrained in UI beyond backend checks.
fields.impact: Authorizes sensitive credential change action.

fields.label: New password
fields.validation: Policy enforced server-side (min length/complexity).
fields.impact: Affects account security posture and auth success.

fields.label: Confirm password
fields.validation: Must match new password.
fields.impact: Prevents accidental credential mismatch during update.
